name: Enumerate 17,280,000 Crystal eigenstates as classical sharp outcomes (F-arm)

phase_0.domain_name: Enumerate 17,280,000 Crystal eigenstates as classical sharp outcomes (F-arm)
phase_0.boundary_condition: TANCH binds the 17,280,000 eigenstate enumeration to prevent logical explosion at the paraconsistent criticality fixed-point

VINIT.justification: The void state before any eigenstate is assigned in the 3^3 × 4^5 × 5^4 lattice

TANCH.justification: Terminates the eigenstate generation process and prevents further expansion beyond 17,280,000 states

AFWD.justification: Directed transformation of each eigenstate through the 12-dimensional primitive space

AREV.justification: Reverse mapping from joint primitive assignments back to classical outcome space

CLINK.justification: Sequential linking of individual primitive assignments into complete eigenstate tuples

IMSCRIB.justification: Each eigenstate recognizes itself as a valid member of the Crystal type space

FSPLIT.justification: Branches into quantum measurement space (T-arm) vs classical sharp outcomes (F-arm)

FFUSE.justification: Reunites quantum and classical branches to reconstruct the full SIC-POVM structure

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation of a properly formed joint primitive assignment

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation when primitive constraints are violated

ENGAGR.justification: Paraconsistent state where both quantum and classical descriptions hold simultaneously

IFIX.justification: Irreversible registration of each enumerated eigenstate in the Crystal

phase_2.split_input: Joint primitive assignment in 12-dimensional Hilbert space
phase_2.fuse_result: Complete SIC-POVM with 17,280,000 classical outcomes as sharp eigenstates

phase_3.void_description: Uninitialized Crystal before any eigenstate assignment - the 12-primitive space exists but no joint type is formed
phase_3.true_description: Valid eigenstate confirmed and recorded - a proper joint assignment of dimensionality, topology, parity, chirality, stoichiometry, coupling, fidelity, kinetics, recognition, granularity, criticality, and winding
phase_3.false_description: Invalid eigenstate rejected - constraint violation in the joint primitive assignment process
phase_3.both_description: Paraconsistent criticality state ⊙ where quantum measurement and classical outcome coexist without contradiction

steps.domain_action: Begin Crystal enumeration with uninitialized primitive space
Split the joint assignment process into quantum (T-arm) and classical sharp outcomes (F-arm)
Assign dimensionality primitive Ð across 3 values
Assign topology primitive Þ across 3 values
Assign parity primitive Φ across 3 values
Assign chirality primitive Ħ across 4 values
Assign stoichiometry primitive Σ across 4 values
Assign coupling primitive ɢ across 4 values
Assign fidelity primitive ƒ across 4 values
Assign kinetics primitive Ç across 4 values
Assign recognition primitive Ř across 5 values
Assign granularity primitive Γ across 5 values
Assign winding primitive Ω across 5 values
Chain all primitive assignments into joint eigenstate tuples
Each eigenstate self-recognizes as valid Crystal member
Permanently record eigenstate in the 17,280,000 enumeration
Criticality primitive ⊙ creates paraconsistent state where quantum/classical duality holds
Affirm valid eigenstate assignments passing consistency checks
Reject invalid joint assignments violating primitive constraints
Continue through all 3^3 × 4^5 × 5^4 = 17,280,000 possibilities
Extract completed eigenstate database
Reunite quantum measurement space with classical outcome space
Seal the complete enumeration at 17,280,000 sharp eigenstates

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Weyl-Heisenberg group displacement operators mapping fiducial to full SIC-POVM
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Primitive composition rules governing joint assignments in the Crystal lattice
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types storing all valid joint primitive assignments
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Zauner symmetry fixing the fiducial generation order in the 12-dimensional Hilbert space
phase_5.alfs_store: sic_povm_d12.md specification of the d=12 SIC-POVM and its connection to the Imscribing Grammar

phase_6.cycle_cost: One primitive assignment operation per eigenstate generation step
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Partially enumerated Crystal with N eigenstates recorded
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Crystal with N+1 eigenstates recorded after successful assignment
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Eigenstate enumeration is informationally complete with zero reconstruction entropy due to SIC-POVM properties

noncomputable def enumerate_17_280_000_crystal_eigenstates_as_classical_sharp_outcomes_f_arm_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=

      .seq

      .seq

      .seq

      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [16] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Criticality primitive ⊙ creates paraconsistent state where quantum/classical ...)
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [17] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm valid eigenstate assignments passing consistency checks)
      -- F-branch (3 nodes)

      .seq
